title: scraper/sample
description: Configuration for the Sample Migration Scraper.

allOf.description: MetricsBuilderConfig is a configuration for sample metrics builder.

metrics.description: MetricsConfig provides config for sample metrics.

linux.memory.available.description: LinuxMemoryAvailableMetricConfig provides config for the linux.memory.available metric.

system.cpu.foo.description: SystemCPUFooMetricConfig provides config for the system.cpu.foo metric.

system.cpu.utilization.description: SystemCPUUtilizationMetricConfig provides config for the system.cpu.utilization metric.

system.cpu.utilization@v1.description: SystemCPUUtilizationV1MetricConfig provides config for the system.cpu.utilization@v1 metric.

system.memory.linux.available.description: SystemMemoryLinuxAvailableMetricConfig provides config for the system.memory.linux.available metric.

emit_legacy_metrics.description: Whether to emit legacy metric names alongside new ones.
